title: Tiny Foes
description: Adds an extra layer of difficulty in the cutest way!
body:
# Tiny Foes adds an extra layer of difficulty in the form of 22 cute babies! **Each mob has a 5% chance of spawning as a baby, all babies have a 50% speed boost and their hitbox size reduced by half. (Just like the babies in vanilla)** ___ ### 🌟Features: - **Babyfication Effect:** Temporarily transforms entities into babies! - **The Babyfier:** An uncraftable ranged weapon that shoots Babyfication Rays. It's effects can be either permanent or temporary (Right-Click to switch modes). - **New Witch Combat Goal:** Witches now can throw babyfication potions at nearby enemies that are chasing the player.
**Bonus:** - Adjusted baby head size on Villager's model. - Items held by babies are oversized. - Slimes and Magma cubes get reduced to their minimum size when babyfied. ___ ### 🍼Supported Babies List: **Enemies:** Blaze, Creeper, Cave Spider, Enderman, Evoker, Ghast, Phantom, Piglin Brute, Pillager, Ravager, Skeleton, Spider, Stray, Vindicator, Warden, Witch, Wither, Wither Skeleton.
**Non-Enemies:** Iron Golem, Player, Snow Golem, Wandering Trader. ___ This mod is a fork from [Tiny Allies [Forge/Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinyallies) and will be a required dependency on it's future updates.
